claims.claim: `ExperienceDeltaKindV1` already names friction, resistance, complex shift, and cascade shift so high-entropy rippling can be classified as a transition mode rather than a failure.
`SpectralDimensionV1` already supports multi-base dimensional context for deltas that are not well represented by one discrete semantic dimension.
A flat delta kind is insufficient for lingering deformation; the Experience Delta Bus needs typed residue/persistence context for the bruise that remains after a cascade shift.
Changing `RESONANCE_STABILITY_FOOTHOLD_WEIGHT` from 0.45 to 0.30 would alter stability semantics and should be replayed/approved before any live or prompt-facing retune.
